REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO INVALIDATE AND EXPUNGE LIEN; AND FOR ORER TO RELEASE FUNDS HELD IN TRUST IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 25, 2026. ON APRIL 28, 2026 AND APRIL 29, 2026 WITHOUT LEAVE OF COURT MOVING PARTY MADE ADDITIONAL FILINGS. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT TIME FOR THE COURT TO REVIEW THESE FILINGS BEFORE APRIL 30, 2026 HEARING. THE COURT MAKES NO DETERMINATION AS TO THE PROPRIETY OF THESE FILINGS AS THEY HAVE NOT YET BEEN REVIEWED. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT ON APRIL 7, 2026 THE COURT ORDERED THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COPY OF A CASE CITED IN THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT NEVER RECEIVED THIS SUBMISSION. MOVING PARTY MUST FILE A DECLARATION ATTACHING A COPY OF THE CASE, AHART V. GOLETA LEMON ASS'N (1978) 156 CAL. APP. 3D 704 CITED AT PAGE 3, LINES 13-14 OF THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED ON FEBRUARY 13, 2026. DECLARATION MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN MAY 29, 2026. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF ON IN OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Invalidate And Expunge Lien; And For Orer To Release Funds Held In Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Exemption

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Invalidate And Expunge Lien; And For Orer To Release Funds Held In Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Continued To Jun-25-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jessica Benedetto; 530-306-8604; plaintiff appearing in pro per.
No other appearances.

Ms. Benedetto contests the courts tentative ruling as to the continuance date and requests a sooner date. The court informs her that a sooner is not available and due her additional filings there is insufficient time for the court to review filings. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAUL MCGRATH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Invalidate And Expunge Lien; And For Orer To Release Funds Held In Trust is continued to June 25, 2026. On April 28, 2026 and April 29, 2026 without leave of Court moving party made additional filings. There is insufficient time for the Court to review these filings before April 30, 2026 hearing. The Court makes no determination as to the propriety of these filings as they have not yet been reviewed. The Court also notes that on April 7, 2026 the Court ordered the moving party to provide a copy of a case cited in the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court never received this submission. Moving party must file a declaration attaching a copy of the case, Ahart v. Goleta Lemon Ass'n (1978) 156 Cal. App. 3d 704 cited at page 3, lines 13-14 of the Memorandum of Points and Authorities filed on February 13, 2026. Declaration must be filed no later than May 29, 2026. There shall be no further filings in support of on in opposition to this motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Exemption
